case_title: WETISCHKA, EMILIA VS LONEY, CATHERINE ANN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-03-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-19-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LONEY, CATHERINE ANN HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WETISCHKA, EMILIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LONEY, CATHERINE ANN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WETISCHKA, EMILIA AS TO DEFENDANT LONEY, CATHERINE ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WETISCHKA, EMILIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONEY, CATHERINE ANN $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-22-1999, GRANTED
